alpha.desc: The view shows the primary structure surrounded by paved circulation and parking areas|Driveways provide access between the site and surrounding roadways|Additional developed features, landscaped sections, and neighboring structures are visible around the property.

bravo.desc: The view shows the primary structure positioned within a developed area containing paved vehicle circulation routes and parking areas|Multiple access points connect the site to adjacent roadways|Additional paved surfaces, landscaped areas, and surrounding developed features are visible throughout the site.

charlie.desc: The view shows the primary structure bordered by paved circulation and parking areas on multiple sides|Vehicle access is provided through several driveways connecting to surrounding roadways|Additional site features, landscaped sections, and neighboring developed properties are visible adjacent to the structure.

delta.desc: The view shows the primary structure located within a developed site containing extensive paved circulation and parking areas|Multiple access routes connect the property to surrounding roadways and nearby developed areas|Additional paved surfaces, landscaped sections, and surrounding site features are visible throughout the property.

nadir.desc: The property consists of a primary structure situated within a developed site containing paved vehicle circulation and parking areas|Multiple access points connect the property to surrounding roadways|Additional paved surfaces, landscaped sections, and supporting site features are visible throughout the property and adjacent developed areas.
